title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.370 - Contracts for fire protection between incorporated cities
text:
71.370.  Contracts for fire protection between incorporated cities. — Any incorporated city in this state having a fire department may contract to furnish fire protection to any other incorporated city or cities in this state, whether or not such other incorporated city or cities have a fire department.
(RSMo 1939 § 7405) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7253
